research_session_preview.research_question: How should manual notes become reviewable Research Candidate Review previews?
research_session_preview.operator_intent: Convert a bounded pasted note into candidate-only review material.
research_session_preview.boundary_notes: Manual parser preview only; no durable research state, proof, evidence, work item, or perspective promotion is created.

source_reference_previews.title: Public-safe manual note on parser preview
source_reference_previews.operator_note_summary: Manual parser preview from bounded prefix-based pasted note.
source_reference_previews.boundary_notes: Reference preview only; no fetch, provider enrichment, indexing, durable write, or source-of-truth authority.

claim_candidates.claim_text: Manual notes should become candidate objects before any durable perspective update.
claim_candidates.boundary_notes: Candidate claim only; not evidence, not proof, not committed state.

evidence_candidates.evidence_summary: The review surface already separates claim, evidence, tension, gap, delta, and follow-up work candidates.
evidence_candidates.quality_note: Manual note evidence candidate requires human review before promotion.
evidence_candidates.boundary_notes: Evidence candidate only; not an Augnes evidence row or proof record.

evidence_candidates.evidence_summary: Parser output should not be treated as provider extraction or proof.
evidence_candidates.quality_note: Manual note evidence candidate requires human review before promotion.
evidence_candidates.boundary_notes: Evidence candidate only; not an Augnes evidence row or proof record.

tension_candidates.summary: Parser convenience could be mistaken for durable research memory.
tension_candidates.operator_question: Parser convenience could be mistaken for durable research memory.
tension_candidates.boundary_notes: Tension candidate only; unresolved review material.

knowledge_gap_candidates.summary: The parser has no runtime UI or storage path yet.
knowledge_gap_candidates.why_it_matters: The parser has no runtime UI or storage path yet.
knowledge_gap_candidates.boundary_notes: Knowledge gap candidate only; not filled by provider inference.

perspective_delta_candidates.before_summary: Research Candidate Review remains a preview-only candidate surface.
perspective_delta_candidates.after_summary: Refine research candidate review toward deterministic manual note preview parsing.
perspective_delta_candidates.proposed_update_summary: Refine research candidate review toward deterministic manual note preview parsing.
perspective_delta_candidates.risk_or_conflict_note: Manual parser delta is not committed state, promotion, or source-of-truth authority.
perspective_delta_candidates.boundary_notes: Perspective delta candidate only; not committed state or promotion.

follow_up_work_candidates.candidate_title: Add Cockpit read-only display for parser preview output after this pure parser slice.
follow_up_work_candidates.candidate_summary: Add Cockpit read-only display for parser preview output after this pure parser slice.
follow_up_work_candidates.reason: Manual note proposed this as follow-up candidate material.
follow_up_work_candidates.boundary_notes: Follow-up work candidate only; not a work item, issue, branch, or dispatch.
